title: if statements should be preferred over switch when simpler
description: "if" statements should be preferred over "switch" when simplerAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellbad-practiceWhy is this an issue?More InfoAswitchstatement is a control flow statement that allows you to execute different blocks of code based on the value of an expression. It provides a more concise way to handle multiple conditions compared to using multipleif-elsestatements.If you only have a single condition to check, using anifstatement is simpler and more concise.switchstatements are designed for handling multiple cases, so using them for a single condition can be overkill and less readable.This rule raises an issue when aswitchstatement has only onecaseclause and possibly adefaultone.switch (condition) { // Noncompliant: The switch has only one case and a de
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Consider using if statements when switch is simple.
